entry.title: Is there any simple XCO code to write Excel file from internal table and vice versa?
entry.content:
I'm looking for a very simple program which demonstrates XCO to read or write an Excel file, which is short and that I can understand and test immediately.

What I have found:

  • SAP Library, great explanations but a little work is needed to get a working code.
    • https://help.sap.com/docs/search?q=XLSX+Read+Access
    • https://help.sap.com/docs/search?q=XLSX+Write+Access
  • Software Heroes, same remark
    • ABAP - XCO Excel

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Is there any simple XCO code to write Excel file from...
entry.content:
I have written two small programs which are short and easy to use, you may install them using abapGit:

sandraros/xco-xlsx-demos: Simple demos for reading and writing to XLSX via XCO

For the explanations, look at the SAP documentation and blog post I have mentioned in my question.

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Zürich
entry.content: Wird auch mal wieder Zeit!

entry.title: SailPoint Identitynow integration to SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hi, We are trying to to write the email address from SailPoint to SuccessFactors and using SuccessFactors connector from SailPoint for the same. We are not able to fetch the email address from SailPoint and write it to PerEmail entity.  We did the picklist mappings and event id mappings and looks correct.  We mapped a custom field and Sailpoint is able to write to that field. What could be the reason for the email not writing to the SuccessFactors Any help is appreciated?

entry.title: Re: Tax Calculation Issue during Crossover year retro due...
entry.content:
FYI, I have managed to handle the issue using PCR's. Wrote series of PCR's just before KATAX function to

1. Identify the pretax amount based on the inflow amount /Z** and add this amount into /108

2. Subtract /108 amount from /106 to avoid annualization.

entry.title: Enterprise Event Enablement - Creating custom event using RAP in S/4 OP
entry.content:
I am trying to capture events triggered on PM Maintenance Order and send them to SAP Event Mesh using the standard Enterprise Event Enablement framework on S/4HANA. It works for create and phase changes like 'In Planning', 'Released' and 'Complete'. However, it does not work for classic 'Change'.  In the standard BO: BUS2007 - Maintenance Order, there is no standard event topic for change of data, meaning, S/4 does not trigger events when something changes in the Maintenance Order. For example, I would like S/4 to fire an event when there is a change in the 'Basic Start Date' of the Maintenance Order. However, there is no standard event topic for 'change'. These are the below events available but they do not trigger when something changes in the Order. 

I have checked the RAP behavior definition for this BO : R_MAINTENANCEORDERTP and also in the list of events in the BOR for the BO: BUS2007, there is no appropriate event defined for change of data.

Is there a way in S/4 that I can extend the standard functionality to trigger an event when something changes on this BO? I want to bind this event to the standard Enterprise Event Enablement framework to send it to SAP Event Mesh. I have gone through a lot of documentation on RAP extensibility of business events but I am unable to wire them together because of my lack of experience in RAP development. 

Can someone show pointers on how this can be achieved?

#SAPEventMesh #SAPEnterpriseEventEnablement SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: 4 Expert Tips for Setting Up the Organizational Structure in SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Do we have option of uploading the Org Structure through a template.

Thanks,

Chempian Pontie

entry.title: Re: Handover of tester in test execution app
entry.content:
Hi Rayane,

To switch a tester in the middle of a test case, you would have to navigate to the involved test plan / test case and in edit mode, use F4 help to switch the user:

You are right that presently, there is no email notification for a tester in test case/test plan, but the Share icon offers a Send E-mail action (see above screen shot with highlight).

Regarding a finished test run, there is a History button that does maintain past runs:

In case these options do not meet your needs, you can always add your ideas in the Influence Campaign:

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

Best Regards,

Paula

entry.title: Re: Change learningCenterUrl parameter for SAP Enable Now
entry.content: It depends on the target application where Companion is running, such as S4/HANA or Ariba. In the https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENABLE_NOW/ website, in the SAP Companion Integration Guide, the target applications are divided into Manager-Based Setup (the LearningCenterUrl is defined within the SEN Manager for target applications such as Ariba or Concur) versus Application-Based Setup (the LearningCenterUrl is defined in Fiori parameters in the target application such as S4/HANA or SuccessFactors). For Manager-Based Setup, you can change it yourself in the Manager. For Application-Based Setup, you will need the Fiori Administrator of the target application to make the change for you.

entry.title: Re: Manager User Report - Export Content Name, versus UID
entry.content: I don't understand the question. The SEN Manager's User Report, which is one of the oldest reports in the Manager, does show the content object's name in the Manager's UI. If you export the report as XLS or CSV, it shows both the content object's name AND the UID.

entry.title: Re: CDS Analytical Query result in Fiori App with "Repating Member" not possible ?
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone please help me with the solution. I cannot find Grid Properties option in the Fiori report (multidimensional).

Thank you in advance.

BR,

Manasa Bandari.

entry.title: Re: Why Sap lock doesn't release automatically?
entry.content:
It's says:
If _SCOPE is set to 1, the lock is not linked with the current SAP LUW. The lock can be released either by calling the DEQUEUE function module if the value 1 or 3 is passed to the formal parameter _SCOPE, or by terminating the program.
Update part unlocks after commit, i don't understand why it's doesn't unlock dialog part after program execution ( after write statement ), so after write it opens a new screen with writed message inside and lock release only after clickin 'Back' 'Cancel' or 'Exit' on the toolbar

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Zürich
entry.content: Bin leider nicht vor Ort😐

entry.title: Re: ABAP in the Cloud: Debugging authorization
entry.content: Hi, have you checked https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/changing-value-in-adt-debugger-in-btp-abap-environment/qaq-p/12629560?

entry.title: Datasphere - Connection is valid, but not all features are available
entry.content:
Datasphere - Connection is valid, but not all features are available. Data Flows: Cause Timed out while connecting to the source.

On setting up source connetions - Validating connection to on-premises in datasphere and getting above error. Confirmed is reaching onpremise souce database and authenticating

Versions:

dpagent 2.8.0 

OracleLogReader 

Oracle 12.1.0.2 - ECC 6 EHP8

Have tried using ojdbc8.jar & ojdbc7.jar

No errors in logs, set logging level to all and nothing stands out.

Anyone else experience similar?

entry.title: Re: Key-user extensibility and updating fields
entry.content:
Hello,

Key user and developer extensibility have different use cases and are technically separate: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/3ccb50e724b045508fea8b2cf1774b2b.html#key-user-extensibility-and-developer-extensibility

A typical scenario for key user extensibility is that you add a custom field to a BO and then use the custom logic app to implement a BAdI where you can read or modify the custom field. So you remain in the tool set intended for key user extensibility. Not sure if ABAP EML is supported in the Custom Logic app.

If you use developer extensibility and extend a released BDEF with the new field, I would expect it can be changed using EML.

I recommend you look at the following guideline: https://www.sap.com/documents/2022/10/52e0cd9b-497e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Regards,
Patrick

entry.title: Re: Thinking in XSLT: Filtering XML elements
entry.content:
Just read through this and was able to successfully create a xslt to filter out the data needed. 

Thank you Morten, i did also read through some of your comments on XSLT before solving my issue. 

Regards

Ravi Raman

entry.title: How to get SAP Enterprise Architecture Knowledge Badge?
entry.content:
Looks like (at least to me), SAP Enterprise Architecture Knowledge Badge is something fairly new SAP Learning is providing…

Okay, let’s be clear – earning “Get Started as an SAP Enterprise Architect” Knowledge Badge is nice, but it is not a “real” Professional Certificate, nor anything of the kind. This Knowledge Badge is exactly as it says – it’s an introduction to SAP EAF (SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework), differentiation and tailoring of TOGAF©, methodologies and tools to use. One may use it just to “verify” his/her EA skills, or one may use this as a first step, to more serious Professional Certification. Either way, obtaining Knowledge Badge is fairly easy:

  • There is no proctored exam, there is just an assessment
  • No “close book” assessment
  • No time/clock pressure
  • No fee
  • Unlimited attempts

So, it’s easy, right?

Well, yes and no… Obviously passing an assessment is actually rather straight forward. But, general expectation is – we do not “cheat”, we learn and pass the assessment in a “fair” manner… After all, why would one try to pass an assessment for SAP EAF if this (or EA in general) is not his/her field of interest (or expertise)…

Still let me recap few impressions on the Learning Journey:

  • Your starting point is: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-enterprise-architecture
  • There are four courses overall.
  • The first two would be quite easy for those who were previously exposed (or have experience) with TOGAF©.
  • The third one is more about SAP tools like SAP Signavio, LeanIX and SAP Cloud ALM. Of course, any knowledge in any of these tools is of great help. I find SAP Signavio knowledge, in particular, quite valuable.
  • The fourth and the final course is more about the actual application of SAP EAF. While this course is rather short, do pay attention on the details… Many of the multiple-choice questions might be coming form this course.

As far as assessment, not too many things to share

  • After finalizing all four courses, you start from: https://learning.sap.com/assessments/discovering-sap-enterprise-architecture
  • It has 30 questions.
  • Cut score is set to 80%.
  • No info which answers were correct.
  • There are many multiple-choice questions – and do not expect to see info “X choices are correct”.
  • Unclear how are multiple-choice questions graded – mostly likely full penalty in case of any wrong choice, do not expect partial points.

At the end, it’s a badge, not a certification. But, still, if SA or EA is our field of interest, why not verifying the knowledge? Gaining some new knowledge is always wort it... And for sure there will be at lease few new & interesting things to learn on this well prepared SAP Learning Journey!

Happy learning!

entry.title: Product Allocation : Using Mask and Selective Restrictions
entry.content:
Hi All

We are in S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01 but are currently not using Advance ATP. We would like to use product allocation but are facing the following challenges. Would appreciate expertise from the forum members:

a. If we have a Product Allocation Structure assigned to a procedure and which is assigned to the material master, the system expects maintenance for all possible combinations.

 - E.g We have a customer order that can be fulfilled from two different plants. Plant 1 has a constraint that we have set which allows a set quantity that can be delivered for the constraint period. We defined a Info Structure based on Sales Org / Plant / Material. However, we find that if we maintain constraints for one plant, the system also expects us to maintain allowed quantities per period for other plants as well. If not, the system forces the confirmed quantity to zero since a plan is not found for the other plant. How do we handle this situation ?

b. We have a product allocation procedure that is based on Sales Org / Customer / Material. However, we only want to constraint the supply for some customers. When we maintain the constraint for these selected customers, the system forces the other customers to have a zero confirmation since there is no restriction for the other customers that has been maintained. This would mean a maintenance of allocations for all customers ? That would be very difficult to do if we have a restriction for only some customers. 

c. We defined a procedure with two info structures and a mask. When we maintain the plan data, it does not allow to put in a # or a * in the characteristics. Hence, if we have to maintain a restriction for one sales organization, as an example and want to indicate that all other sales organizations can have any stocks that they want, we are not able to get allocation to support this request.  Info structures that are defined in a procedure as steps work in a "AND" logic so it is a challenge if want only the applicable info structure to be read. 

d. When the Plan type is maintained, it shows an option of "0" column. What is the function of this option ?

Would appreciate inputs from experts.

Regards

Rohit Zalani

entry.title: Error while processing building block SituationsIndicator in Custom Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a custom Fiori app built using RAP, ODATA V4 UI

Project is my root entity.

I get this error in the Object Page's header section. 

Other sections are displayed correctly.

entry.title: AI-Powered Field Service: What’s New in SAP Field Service Management 2505
entry.content:
SAP Field Service Management 2505 continues our strategic investment in AI-powered field service, introducing Joule for dispatchers, configurable generative AI summaries, technician-facing insights, and the ability to visualize planning scenarios directly from the dispatching board. This release also delivers phase-based model integration for maintenance orders in SAP Cloud ERP Private, further strengthening capabilities for asset-centric field service. 

Additionally, 2505 brings several usability and workflow enhancements, including improved contractor workflows, extended group checkouts, and expanded map and routing capabilities, all designed to simplify operations and accelerate decision-making for dispatchers and field teams.

In this blog, we’ll explore the most notable SAP FSM 2505 features, along with demo videos showcasing key highlights.

👉For the complete list of all features in the 2505 release, click here.

Key Highlights in SAP Field Service Management 2505

  • Joule for Dispatchers – Use natural language to find activities, identify best matching technicians, apply policies, assign/release work, and access SAP Help – all within the dispatcher workspace.
  • Configurable Generative AI – Tailor AI-generated summaries to reflect your organization’s terminology and field service processes, delivering more relevant and actionable insights.
  • Technician-Facing AI Summaries – Technicians can now generate equipment insights directly from the mobile app, enabling faster issue resolution and better-informed service execution.
  • Visualization of Scheduling Proposals – Preview proposed scheduling changes directly on the dispatching board before accepting them, providing greater clarity and control over planned assignments.
  • Phase-Based Model Integration – Supports maintenance orders in SAP Cloud ERP Private using the phase-based model, enhancing synchronization between planning and execution.
  • Service Map Enhancements – Now supports map layer management with ArcGIS Online and visualization of up to 100 routes, helping dispatchers make smarter, map-based decisions.
  • Group Checkout Across Service Calls – Check out multiple activities from different service calls in a single step, generating a consolidated report and improving efficiency for technicians working across jobs.

Note: The Activity Summary, Equipment Insights, and Natural Language Filtering features require a customer to be licensed for SAP AI Units. For more information about licensing, please contact your SAP Account Executive.

Joule Now Available in SAP Field Service Management for Early Adopters

Joule is now available in SAP Field Service Management for both informational and transactional use cases. Whether searching SAP Help content or planning work by finding and assigning the best technician, Joule empowers dispatchers to move faster – with AI-driven support every step of the way. Learn more here.

Joule in SAP Field Service Management also lays the foundation for future Joule Agent capabilities, planned for upcoming releases, to enable autonomous, multi-step workflow execution across field service operations. Learn more about Joule Agents here.

Note: Joule is available for early adopters and is therefore not enabled by default. To enable it, please contact product support.

 

Artificial Intelligence Highlights


 

Configurable AI Summaries

You can now configure which fields and formats are used in AI-generated activity summaries – tailoring insights to match dispatcher and technician needs. This gives users greater control over structure, style, and content, leading to clearer, more relevant AI summaries. For more information, see here.

Configurable AI Summaries

 

Technician-facing AI Equipment Summaries

Technicians can now generate on-demand equipment summaries – ensuring they have the context they need to resolve issues faster, reduce delays, and improve first-time fix rates across the service operation. Read more here.

Technician-facing AI Equipment Summaries

 

Visualization of Scheduling Proposal on the Dispatching Board

Schedulers and dispatchers can now review AI-generated scheduling proposals before applying them – giving greater control over schedule changes, reducing noise, and enabling more confident decision-making in semi-automated planning scenarios. Learn more about this feature here.

Visualization of Scheduling Proposal on the Dispatching Board

 

Activity Insights in HTML Reports

Activity summaries can now be embedded directly into HTML reports – giving all stakeholders in the field service value chain a clear, instant view of what was done during the job. See the documentation here. 

Activity Insights in HTML Reports

 

User Experience & Usability Enhancements

 



Highlighting of Activities on the Dispatching Board

Schedulers and dispatchers can now instantly highlight related activities on the board – making it easier to spot scheduling dependencies tied to the same order, customer, equipment, or location, and drive faster, more informed decisions. Full details here.

Highlighting of Activities on the Dispatching Board

 

Map Layer Control

Dispatchers can now manage ArcGIS Online map layers directly from the Service Map – making it easy to show, hide, and prioritize critical infrastructure data for faster, more informed field service planning. Read more here.

Map Layer Control

 

Expanded Route Visibility – View Up to 100 Technician Routes

Dispatchers can now visualize and validate up to 100 technician routes in a single view – enabling more accurate daily planning, better route optimization, and faster decision-making in dynamic operating conditions. For additional insights, see here.

Expanded Route Visibility – View Up to 100 Technician Routes

 

Faster Work Closure – Group Checkout Across Multiple Service Calls

Technicians can now check out activities from multiple service calls in one step – reducing admin time, streamlining workflows on-site, and generating a single consolidated report for all completed work. Read more here. 

Group Checkout Across Multiple Service Calls

 

Business Rules

This release also brings new flexibility to business rule automation, improving scalability and simplifying configuration.

Smarter Automation – Trigger Business Rules from Multiple FSM Events

You can now trigger a single business rule from multiple FSM events – enabling faster implementation, scalable rule creation, and a cleaner configuration environment by eliminating redundant rules and simplifying automation logic. Learn more in the documentation here.

Trigger Business Rules from Multiple FSM Events

 

Integration

Integration remains a key focus in 2505, with new phase model support aligned to SAP Cloud ERP Private – further advancing SAP’s capabilities in asset-centric field service by seamlessly connecting maintenance planning with field service.

Phase Model Integration – Automate Phase/Subphase Transitions for Maintenance Orders

This release enables integration with the phase-based model in SAP S/4HANA Asset Management (as delivered in SAP Cloud ERP Private) automatically updating maintenance order phases and subphases based on activity assignment, unassignment, and workflow steps. This reduces manual effort, improves process control, and helps ensure accurate, timely synchronization between enterprise asset management and field service operations. Learn more here.

Note: this integration is using the SAP FSM Cloud connector.

Automate Phase/Subphase Transitions for Maintenance Orders

 

Final Thoughts

SAP Field Service Management 2505 continues to strengthen the field service value chain with innovations like Joule for dispatchers, configurable generative AI summaries, improved map and routing capabilities, and deeper integration with SAP Cloud ERP Private. These enhancements accelerate decision-making, drive greater automation, and simplify service execution across the entire field service value chain, while laying the groundwork for future Joule Agents to enable more intelligent, autonomous field service workflows. 

We encourage you to explore these new features, share your feedback, and help shape the future of SAP Field Service Management by submitting your influence requests here. And stay tuned – even more innovations are on the horizon in 2508.

Have thoughts or questions? We’d love to hear from you. Let us know which features you find most impactful or what you'd like to see next. For more insights, visit the SAP Field Service Management Community page or explore our SAP Field Service Management website. You can also watch the SAP Field Service Management 2505 Release Demo here and register for upcoming webinars to stay up to date.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Express Edition 2.00.076.00 License upgrade
entry.content: Thanks!!

entry.title: SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Basic Trial Offering
entry.content:
Introduction

The Basic Trial offering for SAP Build has been extended with a new workbook called "Fusion Development with ABAP Cloud in SAP Build". Since SAP BTP ABAP Environment is part of the SAP Build offering we worked on creating a new workbook for the Basic Trial offering around SAP Build, that shows how developers can now create new ABAP Cloud projects, or work on existing ones, from the SAP Build lobby and then navigate to their ABAP development environment – the ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse (ADT).

How to get your hands dirty

Simply start with clicking on the following URL:   

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/build/trial.html

In the following screen click on "Try Now". 

You will receive a user with a password that will allow you to authenticate at the landing page of the basic trial in the respective region for your user, e.g. https://trials.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/ .  

 

When having used the credentials presented in the web page you will get access to two workbooks that cover two different scenarios that are covered with our current SAP Build offering. 

The ABAP related workbook is named Fusion Development with ABAP Cloud in SAP Build.

Here it is described how you can build a side-by-side extension scenario using SAP BTP ABAP Environment when connecting to a pre-configured SAP S/4HANA Cloud system. 

 

⚠️Caution: 

Please be aware that it may take up to 30 minutes to fully activate your user account in the SAP BTP ABAP Environment.     

So we either recommend to start with the first workbook that does not have an integration to the SAP BTP ABAP Environment (which takes longer than 30 minutes 😉) or only start with the workbook until your user has been activated in the SAP BTP ABAP Environment. Sorry for this inconvenience.  

 

In the ABAP related workbook, you will learn how to create a side-by-side extension using the ABAP Environment of SAP Business Technology Platform. You will perform the following activities:    

  • Create a custom application using the ABAP RESTful application programming model on SAP BTP ABAP Environment as a side-by-side extension.
  • Enable the integration by creating OData client proxies to: a) trigger the creation of a sales order in SAP S/4HANA using the Sales Order (A2X) OData API from this application, and b) read product data using the Product Master Data Including Classification - Read OData API via a value help in this application

The resulting app will look like follows (see below). 

The app uses tha latest features of the RAP framework, namely background processing framewok (BGPF) and event drive side effects.

 

The above mentioned app uses a pre-configured SAP S/4HANA Cloud system as a backend system. 

In the SAP BTP ABAP Environement system a connection to the pre-confired SAP S/4HANA system will be used.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2011 vulns/eol/eos
entry.content: Correct, because it's so old any current or recent vulnerability would not be included in theolder versions. By the way those Java CVE's are not affected in CR. Yes CR includes them but internally they are not used.

entry.title: Re: Can OpenSSL in Crystal Reports 2025 be an install opt...
entry.content: Hi Gerald, I doubt they would but I'll ask them. Known issues with that version so adding a cert for it doesn'tmake sense...

entry.title: Re: Contact Person Creation in SAP S4 HANA: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content: How can I do it Massively, please?

entry.title: Re: Manager User Report - Export Content Name, versus UID
entry.content:
I think I understand now. You're running the User Report, which (like many SEN Manager reports) has a multi-level output. The first level shows the list of users who completed content, and gives a summary of how far along they are in their assignment. You are looking at the first level only. When you click a user name, it drills down to the second level, where you see the Object Name and Object UID of each thing the selected user attempted or completed. The way the report is structured, you can't see both levels simultaneously, either in the Manager UI or in the XLS export.
One workaround using only the SEN Manager is to go into the Administration > Features menu, and in Expert Features, add a semicolon to the end of any existing string in the field, and then add enable_all_raw_report . Then click Save. Then the All Raw Report will appear in the Reports menu. This feature is turned off by default because it can slow down the Manager and/or take a long time to run the report if you run it wide open, so be sure to limit it by a Time Period and Course Assignment. Click the XLS Export button (it does not display any results in the UI) and then review the data. You should see both levels of the User Report's information in one Sheet in the XLS, which I think is what you are looking for.
The other workaround is to use the Manager APIs in the https://enable-now.sap.com website (The SEN Info Center) > Product Integration > Connecting 3rd Party Analytic Applications to dump the same All Raw Report data from SEN Manager out to a Business Intelligence reporting tool. Your mileage may vary in the use of these APIs/BI tools. I usually ask my local BI expert to do these steps because I'm not a BI expert. 

Let me know if this helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Basic Trial Offering
entry.content:
Hello @Andre_Fischer!

I'm trying to create the project but I get an error when the system is selected:

Thanks in advance,

Alessandra

entry.title: Upgrade from old SAP GUI to SAP GUI 8 Patch 12
entry.content:
Dear all,


We are currently working with SAP GUI version 7.40 Patch 19. It's possible to upgrade to Version 8 patch 12 to all users?


Let us know what information do you need.


Thanks 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade from old SAP GUI to SAP GUI 8 Patch 12
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, this is possible and recommended, considering SAP GUI 800 is currently the only supported SAP GUI version.

There are many features changed from version to version, so I suggest you take some time to see each prior version documentation to find out new behaviors you might encounter with update:

  • 2417687 New features in SAP GUI for Windows 7.50
  • 2600384 New and changed features in SAP GUI for Windows 7.60
  • 2796898 New and changed features in SAP GUI for Windows 7.70
  • 3075781 New and changed features in SAP GUI for Windows 8.00

In case you have any issues during upgrade, feel free to contact SAP support!

entry.title: Re: Error Message "Error while Opening the Document"
entry.content: Adobe live cycle designer, is only working, if you are loged in EN - English

entry.title: Re: Document 90000049 saved (no journal entry generated)
entry.content:
Hi Raheel,

Although it is stating that you need to maintain Tax Jurisdiction for the plant 1710 in "OX10", however to analyse more on it, open the billing document in VF03, click on Environment-Acct Determination Analysis - Revenue Accounts.

 

thanks,

entry.title: Re: is it possible to deactivate central procurement hub...
entry.content:
Hello Saikumar,

 

Yes you can de-activate the central hub, to do so you need to goto SPRO-IMG-Purchasing-Central Procurement - Settings in Hub System-Activate SAP S/4HANA Procurement Hub and Scenarios.

make sure you're only de-activating/removing entry from your area.

 

thanks,

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87012394 can be used with Fiori
entry.content:
Already SAP Fiori provided report for this - Prepare Tax Report, Prepare Tax Report - Canada, check the Fiori Library - 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('S_ALR_87012394')/S30PCE

entry.title: Re: PO change in SAP
entry.content:
Hi CCSRINI - 

you need to configure a different output type, which will call the idoc upon your application configuration and update the PO. please check the below thread and use it as per your requirement - 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-members/output-type-sped-trigger-inbound-delivery-after-pgi-for-inter-company-sto-s/ba-p/13505818

 

thanks,

Ankur

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 – Default Contact Name for New Business Partners
entry.content:
Hi Mauricio Cepinho,
When you create a new Customer or Vendor in SAP Business One, the system does not automatically add a contact name. You have to type it in yourself.

How to Handle Contact Names Easily

Manual Way (Default)

  • Go to the "Contacts" tab.
  • Click "Add Contact".
  • Type the contact name (for example, “Main Contact” or the person’s real name).

Automatic Options (If You Want to Make It Easier)

You can ask your SAP partner or IT team to help with these:

  1. Formatted Search
    • Makes SAP auto-fill the contact name based on Logic
    • Make this auto refresh with field value change BP Code
  2. Customization with SDK
    1. A developer can set SAP to always create a default contact like “Main Contact” when you add a new customer or vendor.

If your question has been answered, kindly mark this thread as resolved. Thank you

 

 

Best Regards, 

Rahul Pandey

entry.title: Re: Document 90000049 saved (no journal entry generated)
entry.content: Creo que debe revisar la creación de la Empresa 1700, pues no se incluyó el código fiscal que la identifica, en el maestro, al ponerlo debería desaparecer el problema.

entry.title: Re: Unable to find checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R...
entry.content:
Dear Baruaha,

Ideally, this field should be visible on the screen. If it is not, you will need to enable the Without Qty Posting field through Form Settings (the icon just before the Query Manager).

Best Regards, 

Rahul Pandey

entry.title: Re: How to set the numbering scheme and content of commodity code?
entry.content: Which is correct "dispatch" or "destination" country regarding numbering scheme?

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC - Sales Bill of Material
entry.content: Thanks Lakshmipathi, I need to identify materials that are components in any BOM and currently have an existing condition type (Zxxx) for pricing. These materials should be updated with a new item category group in the material master. The objective is: When the material is included as a component in a BOM, it should be treated as free of charge on the sales order. When the same material is entered on its own in a sales order, the standard pricing using condition type Zxxx should still apply.

entry.title: Re: required data does not exist in this plant IAI1 for t...
entry.content: everything is ok i have no need mention valuation if i am mention valuation class that this error displayed on screen

entry.title: Add sales office and sales group, which are organizational data of sales as profitability segments.
entry.content:
Dear all,

 I want to add sales office and sales group, which are organizational data of sales as profitability segments.
In the private cloud, the fields KMVKBU (Sales Office) and KMVKGR (Sales Group) provided by SAP were added in t-code 'KEA0'. 
In the public cloud, I would like to know if I should define the Custom Fields  related to the sales organization "sales office and sales group"  by selecting the Business Context "Accounting: Market Segment" in the Custom fields app. The reason I ask this question is that after applying the Custom Fields  related to the sales organization "sales office and sales group" as  "Code LIST" in custom Fields app, I need to add a code LIST every time a new value is created, but I don't think I need to do that if I use the fields KMVKBU (Sales Office) and KMVKGR (Sales Group) provided by SAP.

entry.title: SAP INSIDE TRACK São Paulo DEV 2025
entry.content:
The event will take place on July 26th, starting at 8:00AM UTC and end at 18:00PM UTC.

JOIN SAP INSIDE TRACK DEV 2025

An SAP Inside Track is a community event, open for all people from the Community (Customers, Consultants and Freelancers). No matter if you are a developer, business consultant or an architect. The event is organized by peers from the community.. and YOU are able to influence the agenda.

More information:

Language: Portuguese and English

Costs: 30 BRL - this value will be revert to non profit social organization and registration is mandatory :

https://www.eventbrite.com.br/e/sap-inside-track-sao-paulo-2025-dev-pass-tickets-1393162349089?aff=oddtdtcreator or click here LINK

Sponsored By: SAP Community

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration.

Location 

  • @PUC Marques de Paranaguá  - Auditório Caio Prado  Rua Caio Prado, 205 Consolação

Organization:

Roberta Fernandes

Edson Thomaz

Marssel Vilaça

João Secco

Volunteers:

Carlah Lopes

Denner

Leo Coelho

Stanley 

Yan Machado

Valeria Pires

Michelle Machado

Paulo Lunardi

Mari 

Rafael Freitas

Rodrigo Belmonte 

Larissa Aires 

Eduardo Palafoz

Social Media:

LINKTREE SITSP

INSTAGRAM SITBR

LINKEDIN SITSP

More information  will be publish in our media, please follow  @sitbrazil

Use #sitsp2025 hashtag, use @_sitsp for mentioning us.

entry.title: Re: Bin sorting in EWM
entry.content:
Cross-Line Stock Putaway:

Use -> In this function, a sort variable helps the system to search for suitable storage bins. With the sort variable, you can eliminate the problems caused by one-sided loading in the warehouse and optimize the stock putaway process in your warehouse. If the sort variable has not been defined, the system sorts using the storage bin coordinate itself.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/b2dee5e83e2446149294f9860a7c08f0/d590c95360267214e10000000a174cb4.html

Example of CLSP: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/1d1f725499f30d4ee10000000a423f68.html?locale=en-US

"what is the significance of sorting for put away?  And my second and major question is what is the significance of sorting for picking activity? "-> This is the path sequence/ distance  by warehouse operator working in order to pick or put away...Example: which bin/stocks fill or pick first or second... when operators are in action  ... Create WOs as per Aisle with bin sort (WT Sort) So operator can perform the specific Aisle/AA/Zone ...All depends on physical Warehouse Layout, Optimisation process  and handling resources for efficient use.

Example:  Business/WH Operators  wants putaway/fill the stocks into Storage bin while entering into Aisle ( starting position of Aisle) however Picking should start happen by ending position of Aisle. Technically In this case PTWY and PICK Path sequence (Bin Sorting) must be reverse in number.  

Please let us know if you have doubts.

entry.title: Evento em Curitiba reúne SAP e especialistas para discutir inovação, IA e Reforma Tributária no GROW
entry.content:
No próximo dia 13 de junho , Curitiba será palco de um dos encontros mais relevantes do ano para líderes de tecnologia, finanças e estratégia empresarial: o CVA SUMMIT 2025 .

Realizado na Arena Digital da PUC-PR , o evento reunirá grandes nomes da SAP e especialistas do mercado para debater o presente e o futuro dos negócios digitais no Brasil. A programação inclui temas que estão no centro das decisões das empresas brasileiras, como GROW with SAP , Inteligência Artificial aplicada à gestão , plataformas de inovação como o SAP BTP , e os impactos da Reforma Tributária na gestão fiscal .

Entre os palestrantes confirmados estão:

  • Eduardo Ferraz , Head Brasil do GROW com SAP

  • Christian Geronasso , CRO Global de Inteligência Artificial da SAP

  • Arthur Proença , Consultor de Soluções Digitais da SAP BTP

  • João Emílio , Executivo SAP LeanIX e Signavio

  • Luiz Fernando Albertin , Gerente Engenheiro de Vendas na Avalara

Mais do que um evento, o CVA SUMMIT é uma experiência imersiva , pensada para fornecer conexões de qualidade entre profissionais que desejam estar à frente das transformações do mercado. Com um ambiente tecnológico e inovador, o encontro oferece ainda coffee break, almoço estratégico e estacionamento incluído .

“Transformação, inovação e estratégia fiscal em um só lugar”,  esse é o espírito do CVA SUMMIT 2025. Um convite para refletir, aprender e se conectar com quem está fazendo a diferença na jornada digital das empresas brasileiras .

Arena Digital da PUC-PR – Curitiba/PR, dia 13 de junho – a partir das 8h30 | Evento exclusivo para líderes de TI, CFOs, CEOs, Controllers e tomadores de decisão. INSCREVA-SE: https://solucoes.cvaconsultoria.com.br/summit-2025-cva

entry.title: Re: Key-user extensibility and updating fields
entry.content: A_Equipment, did you check this? I just did a test, the zfield is added to that bo at least.

entry.title: MD04 and VA33 show different dates
entry.content: I created a sales scheduling agreement using VA31, and the dates on the Forecast delivery schedule are 6/4 and 6/5, but the dates found in Stock/Requirements (MD04) are all 6/3 (today). I would like to ask how to set the date to be consistent.

entry.title: Re: Load balancer for multiple SAP integration suite tenant
entry.content:
Hi Joergdw,

Thanks for the answer,  the solution we are seeking for is to distribute the external requests sent to SAP Integration Suite tenant rather the SAP BTP CF application itself. for exam we have customer service ODATA deployed from SAP business suite on tenant A. and there will be more than 10 billons requests coming everyday. now we planning another tenant B with same ODATA service provided to balance the requests sent from customer. not sure if it is there the same services available from SAP Integration Suite like autoscale service used from CF environment. 

Thanks, 

Grady

entry.title: Re: IP30 doesn't reschedule maintenance plan as there is...
entry.content:
Hi Neeraj:

The client has thousands of maintenance plans, we changed most of them on 2 shift factors in order to make the call planned on key date but not TECO date, user don't accept to run scheduling for maintenance plan one by one using IP10, do we have any mass plan approach to schedule the changed maintenance plans one time?

Thank you and nice day

Yun

entry.title: BOM更改凭证无法显示
entry.content: BOM存在更改,但是显示BOM并且在BOM的“菜单”-“环境”-“更改凭证”，路径中，更改凭证为灰色，即无法查询BOM的更改凭证，其中BOM抬头产品为“17”，BOM用途为“1”

entry.title: How to filter the list when the column is 1:n relation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a webapp using SAP Business Application Studio in BTP. 

The app is connected to S4 HANA Cloud system using oData v2 API

I have view which is a list of products. I want to add a search box to filter the result by Production Description column. Production and Product Description has 1:n relation.

I am using the below source codes. But it doesn't work. 

I get the error in the console - Error during request to remote service: Left hand expression of memberaccess operator has wrong cardinality (to many not allowed)

Can someone please help me?

 

                var aTableSearchState =[];
                var sQuery = oEvent.getParameter("query");

                if (sQuery && sQuery.length > 0) {
                    var ProductTypeFilter = new Filter("ProductType", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var MaterialFilter = new Filter("Material", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var LanguageFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Language", FilterOperator.EQ, 'EN');
                    var DescriptionFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Description", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var QueryFilter1 = new Filter({ filters:[LanguageFilter, DescriptionFilter], and: true});
                    //var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter], and: false});
                    var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter, QueryFilter1], and: false});
                    aTableSearchState.push(QueryFilter);
                }
                this._applySearch(aTableSearchState);
 
         
_applySearch: function(aTableSearchState) {
          
           var oTable = this.byId("table"),
           oViewModel = this.getModel("worklistView");
            oTable.getBinding("items").filter(aTableSearchState, "Application");
            // changes the noDataText of the list in case there are no filter results
            if (aTableSearchState.length !== 0) {
                oViewModel.setProperty("/tableNoDataText", this.getResourceBundle().getText("worklistNoDataWithSearchText"));
            }

        }

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA BP screen enhancement with custom tab
entry.content:
Hi Andi,

I have a requirement to add a custom tab in BP for vendor role with custom table fields and upon save the data should be saved in the custom table. I have followed the SAP cookbook and did the development but the Badi implementation of enhancement spot vendor_extension is not getting called and data is not saving in custom table. I could able to fetch data from stable and show it in the new tab but saving back is not working. Can you please share your thoughts on this?

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"Design improvements won’t end with the introduction of Project Glow. We’ll soon add a one-column layout (to make it easier to skim new posts) and add support for dark theme. We’ll announce these changes in What’s New as soon as they are available."

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

ZFiori.

 

Regards.

Hi Ivelina,

I'm facing the below issue while provisioning the users and role collections from Local Identity directory to BTP (XSUAA). Also the central based provisioning is not working. 

error=The request to create an entity has failed with: 409 Conflict ''
The attempt to retrieve the existing entity from the target system was unsuccessful. More than one entity found.

Could you please advise.

Thank you.

Regards,

Prashanth

entry.title: Re: How to Remove "One Time Deduction" from Action menu on People Profile - Employee Centr
entry.content: Hi @Ramya9, could you please check KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/2977787 and https://me.sap.com/notes/2731612 ? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Bem Vindos ao Grupo de Salvador da Comunidade SAP!
entry.content:
Olá Aline! Olá Comunidade SAP de Salvador!

Primeiro, quero agradecer a Aline por abrir este espaço que estava faltando para os gurus SAP de Salvador 🙂

Eu aproveito para também me apresentar: Eu sou Emmanuel Halbout, consultor SAP técnico polivalente / Desenvolvedor fullstack SAP: ABAP OO, UI5, BC, Workflow, ... Participei de muitos projetos de integração, implantação, upgrade, pela Europa, e pelo mundo, e tenho experiência e conhecimento com vários módulos : MM, SD, LE, PP, QM, WM, EWM. Sou colaborador da HRC Consulting, empresa francesa de consultoria SAP, de 80 colaboradores, que atua em vários setores e módulos, com foco especial na supply-chain e no desenvolvimento de aplicativos móveis para SAP.

Minha vida é meio atípica pois está compartilhada entre a França e a Bahia (~6 meses aqui, ~6 meses lá). Aqui em Salvador estou morando no Rio Vermelho, com minha esposa e minha filha. Minha esposa trabalha com o NEOJIBA, um programa social do governo da Bahia. Eu sou jogador de vôlei de praia, e também gosto de nadar, correr e pedalar.

Voltando a SAP, a maioria dos clientes com quem estou trabalhando são europeus, mas eu quero conhecer outros atores de SAP aqui na Bahia. O povo baiano é o mais acolhedor e mais caloroso que tem. Seria uma alegria conhecer vocês, e, quem sabe, colaborar ou criar amizades !

Sinto muito por não ter participado do SAP Inside track 2025, mas naquele momento tive que dar foco na nossa criatura recém-nascida 🙂

Vou deixar aqui meu endereço e-mail, e se vocês gostariam de conversar, de compartilhar, sobre assunto SAP ou outros, de se encontrar, por favor me escrevam    ===>   emmanuel.halbout@hrc-consulting.fr

Até logo !! A bientôt !!

Emmanuel

entry.title: Re: Activate activity-based consolidation of Investments
entry.content: If you can use Activity based COI, you can use S21. If not, you can use only Rule based COI with task group S20

entry.title: Re: Developing a UI5 App with Value Help from CSV, Charts with VizFrame, and Excel Upload/Download
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"The data shown in the value help comes from a CSV file named dropdown_master.csv, which is located in the model folder inside the webapp directory. This CSV file is loaded as a model and used to populate the dropdown options in the value help dialog."

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Mastering Complex SBPA Approvals : A Deep Dive into Wait Steps, Script Tasks, and API Integrations
entry.content:
Welcome back to our new blog series, where we previously delved into the intricacies of dynamic sequential approval workflows.

In this two-part series, my colleague @Adwait_Fadnavis  and I will explore some very critical business workflow  requirements  in detail using SAP Build Process Automation. 

We will demonstrate how to use various SAP Build Process Automation tools to solve real-time challenges effectively.

This blog post addresses this complex requirement with detailed step-by-step instructions. You'll learn how to ensure workflows advance smoothly, even with  approval condition utilizing various innovative latest features such as: Wait Step with API Triggering , Workflow Context update via API etc.

Business Context and Problem Statement

While working on multiple SAP Build Process Automation projects, we have faced situations where workflows only proceed if all departments or approvers approve them unanimously.

If any approver rejects the proposal, the entire workflow is rejected . This creates a need for a parallel approval process, adhering to an "all-or-nothing" requirement, which SAP's standard solutions do not support.

In a below sample procurement workflow, the request is created and submitted. Both the Department Manager and Finance Department must approve it simultaneously. If either rejects, the workflow is terminated.

If both approve, the request goes to the Executive for final approval. The Executive's decision determines whether the request is processed or terminated.

Technical Solutioning & Design

In this process, we will create two workflows using SAP Build Process Automation’s Low Code/No Code approach.

Let’s refer to these as Workflow A (main workflow) and Workflow B.

Workflow A( Main Workflow): This is the main workflow, triggered with all input parameters, responsible for the overall business process flow.

Workflow B(Secondary Workflow): This workflow handles the approval task. It receives the Approval ID, total number of levels, and current level. If the final approval is granted, it triggers a wait step API  in Workflow A to proceed to the next level. If more approvals are needed, it sends the Approval ID to the next level.

 
Technical Design Steps for Workflow A:
 
  1. Trigger Workflow: The workflow is initiated with input parameters.
  2. Decision Creation: A decision step is created to determine the number of approvals require. 

3. Script Task: This step determines the total number of approvals and the current approval level.

$.context.custom.doneapprovalcount = 0;
$.context.custom.currentcount = 0;
$.context.custom.subwfdefinationid = "Your Secondaray Workflow ID"; // replace with your secondary workflow id
$.context.custom.totalapprovalcount = $.context.decision_getAppprovers_1.Approvers.length;
$.context.custom.triggeredsubprocessids = [];
​
  • Condition Check: If the current level matches the total required approvals, A wait step will be created to wait for the completion. If not, Workflow B is triggered to initiate the approval task.

  • Trigger Workflow B: Workflow B sends the work item to the respective user for approval.
  • Wait Step API : This critical step waits for all parallel approvals to be completed. Once done, the dummy decision is triggered by Workflow B. This is very interesting and latest features
    1. Create a Wait Step with API as follows. After Deployment it will event will create the API End Point which will used to trigger from secondary workflow B .      
    2. Execution ID is the Parent Workflow ID.
    3. Upload the API specification and create the action for this
    4.  Also make sure to create the API key which will be used to trigger it from secondary workflow B.

Technical Design Steps for Workflow B  (Triggered via Workflow A)

  1. Trigger from Workflow A : Workflow B starts when Workflow A reaches a certain point to manage approval tasks separately and in parallel to the main workflow.

  2. Send Approval Task: The approval task is sent to the current level approver to obtain necessary approvals at each level before proceeding.
  3. On Approval: The system retrieves instance details and updates the approval count to keep track of completed approvals and update the workflow status.  
  4. sample code
$.context.custom.approvedcount = $.context.action_get_getV1WorkflowInstancesWorkflowInstanceIdContext_6.result.custom.doneapprovalcount + 1;
  • Check Count: The system checks if all required approvals are obtained:
    • If all approvals are done, the workflow proceeds to the next step.
    • If not all approvals are done This ensures the workflow only proceeds once all approvals are obtained
  •  Update Parent Workflow A Approval Action : increment the update count. created a custom action. If all the approvals not done, then update the approval count via custom action. (refer our previous blog how to create action for workflow API)   
  • Retrieve Task ID & Trigger Wait API trigger wait step ( API) in Workflow A to signal that the approval process is complete / Reject  and it can proceed.
    • Now come to most crucial part of the Development: Trigger the wait step via API
    • Created a custom action project  for the wait step api end point.
    • Here is the Input mapping for the API call. Needs to provide the API Key and Parent ID.
    • It will trigger the wait step in workflow A to approve / move forward the workflow . 
 
In the upcoming blog post, @Adwait_Fadnavis  will delve into the complete end to end testing for these which is very critical to understand the whole development flow.
 
Stay tuned for a comprehensive guide that will enhance your understanding and streamline your Development  process.

Regards,

Mohit Bansal,

SAP Mentor. SAP BTP Solution Architect

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Pong Game - A Fun Fusion of Custom Widgets and Standard Functionalities
entry.content: really love this work, bring some fun to the work, nice job!!

entry.title: Re: Can Profile Preview or Spotlight be configured to inc...
entry.content:
Hi @AndrewPostma , As I check relevant documents, I don't see any designed configuration to display userid or empid in spotlight. As a workaround, you can try to configure employment differentiator which you need to configure a custom field to store id in job information. Please refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-employee-central/implementing-and-managing-employment-lifecycle-from-hiring-to-termination/adding-employment-differentiators-to-indicate-multiple-employments .
And login name can be displayed in spotlight , please check Enhancements to Data Viewing in Full Profile | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: How to maintain copy control from preliminary billing...
entry.content:
Hi Chuma!

I tried entering the manual conditions after creating the preliminary billing document. But upon billing document creation, prices are redetermined again and the manual entries are removed. I think the default pricing type behavior for preliminary billing document to billing document is "G".

Sadly, the BAdI you mentioned is not available in our system.

entry.title: Best Practices for Calculating Actual Underutilization Costs
entry.content:
In our company we are using below mechanisms to calculate calculate under utilisation cost. 

   - Actual hours Vs Planned hours
   - Actual absorption rate Vs Planned absorption rate

What is the SAP recommended best practise for this?

entry.title: Re: Unable to find checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R...
entry.content: Thanks for the response. How to enable Batch/Serial field ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for June – SAP CAP ❄️ 🏔️
entry.content: Escaped the room

entry.title: Re: SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Basic Trial Offering
entry.content:
Hi Alessandra,

please try again with the credentials you received. I forgot to mention in my blog post, that it can take up to 30 minutes before the user, that is created for you in the identity provider, is also being created in the respective SAP BTP ABAP Environment which has its own user database.

Kind regards,
Andre

entry.title: Re: Document 90000049 saved (no journal entry generated)
entry.content: Check whether the Ship-To has Tax Jurisdiction code.  From your post, it seems, it is not maintained.  Maintain that and again try to release the billing document via vf02

entry.title: Re: Mapping Header Text for OrderRequest
entry.content: Best practice is to actually include an URL to your company's website instead and send the entire T&Cs.

entry.title: Re: Story Changes Lost in Edit Mode Due to Active Bookmark in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: If you can steadily reproduce this issue, I would recommend to create a ticket on this to SAP.

entry.title: Re: Serial numbers for refurbishment
entry.content:
Hi

Please check if related material is activated for Sr.no. managem3nt and batch management.

entry.title: Re: S4Hana Green field Implementation - Activate Methodology - Deliverables - 3 Pillars - Consultant
entry.content: Useful

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Cost on Partial Finished Goods Receipt in P...
entry.content:
Hi,

In standard configuration, the finished goods should be valued at Standard Price and the goods receipt should use this to valuate the quantity received from the order. Please check the material price. With standard price the values posted onto the order are not relevant for valuating the finished goods stock on receipt to inventory.

entry.title: Can't send documents using the Microsoft Outlook
entry.content:
Hi,

We are encountering the following error message when attempting to send documents using the following method. We are using Microsoft 365.
 
"Cannot open Microsoft Outlook instance; check that Microsoft Outlook is installed and that it runs with the same permission level as SAP Business One"

entry.title: Re: How to send parameter values to SAC Data Action throu...
entry.content:
You check this script API to get dimension

var filter = Application.getFileDataSource(modelID).getDimensionFilters(dimensinonID);

entry.title: Re: Bill from Gujarat and Dispatch from Rajasthan
entry.content: I don't think, it is possible to meet this requirement.  As per GST law, you need to have a unique GSTIN in the state from which, the goods are being sold.  See below SAP explanation

entry.title: Re: Enquiry about Joule activation using BTP Trail account
entry.content:
Hello @felixbartler, we just wanted to know the latest updates as of May-June, whether SAP Joule can be setup through BTP Trial Account or not?? And further, will we be able to integrate it into SAP DSP and SAC going from Trial Account only?

Also is there any more information document or future release being prepared, so I would like to know that about too. 
Thank you for your time!!

entry.title: Re: GRC 2026 vs GRC S4HANA
entry.content: GRC2026 is not released yet and all these will be addressed as part of Q&A. Nevertheless, I do not see any issues with these functionalities.

entry.title: Re: GRC 12.0 - Access Request Notifications - URL Mainten...
entry.content: You can check this KBA 1896961 - HTTP/HTTPS Configuration for SAP NetWeaver Gateway. There is no configuration from AC side.

entry.title: Re: Story Changes Lost in Edit Mode Due to Active Bookmark in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Thank you, William.

I’ve been able to consistently reproduce the issue and would like to clarify the behavior:

  • After making formatting changes (such as text color, font size, font style, layout, etc.) and saving the story, the changes are correctly saved.
  • However, when the story is later opened in View Mode, it seems that a Bookmark is automatically applied, which reverts the story to an older formatting state.
  • When switching to Edit Mode, the story still reflects the Bookmark state. If this goes unnoticed and the story is saved again, it appears as though the recent formatting changes are lost.

This behavior can be confusing, especially when users are unaware that a Bookmark is being auto-applied at runtime.

I’ll proceed to raise a support ticket as you suggested. In the meantime, it would be helpful to know if there’s a way to prevent automatic Bookmark loading or to default to the last saved state when opening a story.

Thanks again for your guidance!

entry.title: Re: MD04 and VA33 show different dates
entry.content: From SD perspective, you should always check co09 and not md04.  Have a look at this SAP  help  documentation

entry.title: Re: Roles of SAC in IAG
entry.content: Currently only Teams is allowed.

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2025 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇵🇪 🇲🇽 🇨🇴 (July 25th - Aug 12th 2024
entry.content: See you there! Greetings from Peru 😄

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 – Default Contact Name for New Business Partners
entry.content:
Hi Mauricio,

you can try it with a FMS (formatted Search).

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
Its been 25 years for me , since I have heard SAP word. 

It was in year 2000, when my organization was evaluating ERP products and SAP was selected to be implemented 

, fortunately i was Materials Core Team Member for this project.

entry.title: Re: Unable to find checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R...
entry.content:
Hi,

it is only possible in Credit Memo. In a newer version it will be implemented

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Explore SAP BTP DMS Rest APIs
entry.content:
Hello @aman175105 

Can you provide any details about how you used Cloud Integration to replicate files from SAP ECC to SAP BTP DMS ?

 

Regards, 
Lakshmi

entry.title: Re: IP30 doesn't reschedule maintenance plan as there is...
entry.content:
Hi yun ,

Based on my knowledge, there is no standard transaction or configuration in SAP that can automatically reschedule maintenance plans according to the latest changes made in the configuration for maintenance plans in sap. But i would i like to recommend you do it by using LSMW or else any zprogram which can be developed by using function modules or else by using call objects .

Thanks & regards ,
Neeraj.

entry.title: Re: Integrating a Data Export Job into an SAP Analytics Cloud Multi Action
entry.content:
Hi, is there a similar approach to retract data on a s/4 private cloud in RISE?

stefano

entry.title: Re: 🇲🇽 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Mexico City, Mexico)
entry.content: Nos vemos en Agosto por alli 🙂

entry.title: Re: Cause Code Filtering Not Working Based on Damage Code...
entry.content:
Hi mohit ,

Filtering Cause Codes based on the selected Damage Code in a SAP PM notification is not possible in standard SAP — by default, the relationship between Damage Codes and Cause Codes is not dynamic or dependent. 

Thanks & regards , 
Neeraj.

entry.title: Re: Mission : Integrate SAP Signavio Process Manager with...
entry.content:
Good day Belen,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community!  It is recommended that you create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password), as described in this video, to have an expert look into this specific issue.

 

If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 

 

Kind regards,

 

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: Unable to find checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R...
entry.content: I am able to enable Without Qty Posting field now but how to enable Batch/Serial field at row level ?

entry.title: Re: Post tax payable - Vat return Poland - list of invoices included
entry.content: Question forwarded to experts. Hope it can be answered soon.

entry.title: Re: RAP : Error for Action with Deep Table Parameter - Me...
entry.content: Try using static action

entry.title: Matrix consolidation in CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

We are trying to bring profit center elimination hierarchy(Matrix Consolidation) in the AFO report using  custom CDS View. But we are getting below warning, when we try to select profit center hierarchy in query the variable is showing blank and no hierarchies are displayed. How can we resolve this?

entry.title: Re: How to Configure SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation for Your SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Landscape
entry.content: good article

entry.title: Re: Issue with History Log for Profit Segment Fields in S...
entry.content: Not all standard fields will have change log.  Go to se11, input that field name and execute.  Select Further Characteristics tab and see whether the box against "Change Document" is ticked. If this is ticked, then the changes will get updated in the history log

entry.title: Re: Key-user extensibility and updating fields
entry.content: The field is indeed added there, but you can't update it via that object (in EML, or a OData call)
